tasks.title: Fix DNS message handling regression
tasks.issue: A generated DNS message path fails after a patch changes how records are parsed and serialized. The task includes install logs, test patches, golden patches, and noisy environment artifacts.

candidateFiles.preview: func unpackMsgHdr(msg []byte, off int) (Header, int, error) { /* parser */ }
type RR interface { Header() *RR_Header; String() string }
Long test execution log summarized into failure signature and affected assertions.
Install output, dependency download noise, shell environment.
Environment metadata intentionally excluded from public context.

cachedNova.rootCause: The parser and serializer disagreed on record shape after the patch, so the generated fixture failed the round-trip assertion.
cachedNova.patch: Guard the record path before packing and normalize the header length during unpack.
cachedNova.test: go test ./... passed on the targeted DNS message test.

tasks.title: Fix Scala steward update parsing behavior
tasks.issue: A dependency update workflow fails when parsing a generated XML installation trace and applying the expected golden patch. The useful context is buried under bulky XML logs and IDE artifacts.

candidateFiles.preview: final case class Update(groupId: GroupId, artifactId: ArtifactId, version: Version)
def exec(command: Nel[String], cwd: Path): F[CmdResult] = ...
Expected dependency update diff used as compact task supervision.
Huge XML test trace summarized to failing command, file path, and assertion.
IDE workspace artifact blocked as irrelevant context.

cachedNova.rootCause: The update workflow consumed a noisy XML trace instead of the compact failing command and golden patch context.
cachedNova.patch: Route the update parser through the compact patch metadata and preserve the expected version comparison.
cachedNova.test: Targeted Scala Steward golden patch test passes in cached run.
